questions.subject: Current Affairs
questions.prompt: The 'Spotlight Initiative', a global partnership frequently mentioned in international forums, primarily aims to:

options.text: Combat illicit financial flows and money laundering in developing nations.
Eliminate violence against women and girls, particularly the most marginalized.
Provide legal aid to victims of cross-border terrorism in conflict zones.
Promote sustainable energy transitions in Small Island Developing States (SIDS).

questions.explanation: The UN Spotlight Initiative is a joint effort between the European Union (EU) and the United Nations (UN) specifically designed to ensure that all women and girls live free from violence and harmful practices.
questions.takeaway: The Spotlight Initiative is a thematic partnership between the EU and UN focusing on gender-based violence.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: UN Spotlight Initiative: European Union (EU) and the United Nations (UN). To ensure that all women, especially those marginalised and vulnerable, live free from violence and harmful practices.
